g.text: Speedup increases with sequence length — KV cache essential for production inference

div.p: Naive Approach: Each generation step re-encodes the entire sequence. Step 100 computes attention for positions 0-99 → 10,000 scores Total: Σ(i²) for i=1 to 100 ≈ 338,350 score computations KV Cache Approach: Store K,V tensors from previous steps. Step 100 only computes K,V for position 99, reuses cached 0-98. Total: 100 × 100 = 10,000 score computations (single forward pass)

text.tspan: # Step i: Only compute K,V for new token

g.text: cached_K = concat(cached_K, new_K) # Append to cache
scores = Q_i @ cached_K.T / sqrt(d_k) # O(i) for position i

text.tspan: # Step i: Only compute K,V for new token
